questions.question: What does "ubiquitous" mean?
questions.explanation: Ubiquitous: existing or being everywhere at once; omnipresent

questions.question: What does "benevolent" mean?
questions.explanation: Benevolent: well meaning and kindly; charitable

questions.question: What does "verbose" mean?
questions.explanation: Verbose: using more words than needed; wordy

questions.question: What does "pragmatic" mean?
questions.explanation: Pragmatic: dealing with things sensibly and realistically

questions.question: What does "ambiguous" mean?
questions.explanation: Ambiguous: open to more than one interpretation; unclear

questions.question: What does "obfuscate" mean?
questions.explanation: Obfuscate: render obscure, unclear, or unintelligible

questions.question: What does "sycophant" mean?
questions.explanation: Sycophant: person who acts obsequiously to gain advantage; yes-man

questions.question: What does "perspicacious" mean?
questions.explanation: Perspicacious: having sharp judgment or discernment; insightful

questions.question: What does "pedantic" mean?
options: Overly concerned with formal rules and trivial details
questions.explanation: Pedantic: excessively concerned with minor details or rules

questions.question: What does "ephemeral" mean?
questions.explanation: Ephemeral: lasting for a very short time; transitory

questions.question: What does "epistemology" mean?
options: Study of knowledge and justified belief
questions.explanation: Epistemology: philosophical study of knowledge, belief, and justification

questions.question: What does "ontological" relate to?
options: The nature of being and existence
questions.explanation: Ontological: concerning the nature of being, existence, and reality

questions.question: What does "hermeneutics" mean?
questions.explanation: Hermeneutics: theory of text interpretation, especially biblical and philosophical

questions.question: What does "dialectical" mean?
options: Relating to logical argumentation via contradiction and resolution
questions.explanation: Dialectical: method of argument through contradiction (thesis-antithesis-synthesis)

questions.question: What does "empiricism" emphasize?
questions.explanation: Empiricism: theory that all knowledge derives from sensory experience
